data.title: Bitcoin Cash Up More Than 5% In 24 hours
data.description: Bitcoin Cash's (CRYPTO: BCH) price has increased 5.61% over the past 24 hours to $346.44, which is in the opposite direction of its trend over the past week, where it has experienced a 13.0% loss, moving from $389.54 to its current price.

data.title: General Motors Remains Committed To China Despite Losses, Restructuring Needs: CFO Highlights Cash Stability Goals
data.description: Despite a $104 million loss in China and calls for exit, GM remains committed to a profitable, self-sustaining operation in the region, says CFO Jacobson.

data.title: AI Technology Once Used In Cancer Research Now Develops 'Plant Vaccines' For Cannabis Viroids
data.description: Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Massachusetts, Verne Bioanalytics is a leading biotech firm focusing on pathogen and genetic testing. The company assists small and large farmers in the cannabis, wine and hemp industries to mitigate risk and increase productivity using artificial intelligence and mail-delivered test kits.

data.title: Market Clubhouse Morning Memo - August 9th, 2024 (Trade Strategy For SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META And TSLA)
data.description: Good Morning Traders! In today's Market Clubhouse Morning Memo, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

data.title: EUR/USD Stabilises Amid Fed Speculation And Absence Of Major Economic Data
